simulation.narrative: The virtual meeting room materializes on screens across three time zones as Sean McDonald opens the weekly standup. The familiar grid of faces appears — Aria Chen already sharing her sprint board, Marcus Webb adjusting his glasses over a steaming coffee, and the clean geometric avatar of Hermes Agent 1 pulsing with real-time Clockchain metrics.

characters.name: Sean McDonald
characters.description: A man in his late thirties with short dark hair and a sparse beard, wearing practical modern spectacles. His analytical intensity is tempered by an approachable demeanor.
characters.expression: Focused and serious, with a subtle tension in his jawline — offering affirming nods as each team member speaks.

characters.name: Aria Chen
characters.description: A woman in her late twenties with keen, alert eyes behind stylish rectangular glasses. Dark hair pulled back in a practical ponytail.
characters.expression: Focused and attentive, brow slightly furrowed as she concentrates on her sprint report.

characters.name: Marcus Webb
characters.description: A man in his late thirties with a neat short beard and practical spectacles. Earnest, intelligent gaze.
characters.expression: Analytical, with slight tension around his eyes reflecting the urgency of the metrics review.

characters.name: Hermes Agent 1
characters.description: A sleek, minimalist digital avatar — an abstract geometric form projecting real-time data visualizations. Non-human, functional, always-on.
characters.expression: Perpetually neutral. Its 'expression' is conveyed through the clarity of its data display.

dialog.speaker: Sean McDonald
dialog.text: Good morning, team. Let's make this efficient — sprint progress first, then Clockchain growth.

dialog.speaker: Sean McDonald
dialog.text: Hermes, project the sprint metrics for this review.

dialog.speaker: Aria Chen
dialog.text: I'm ready to share my screen — there's a velocity metric I'd like us to examine closely.

dialog.speaker: Sean McDonald
dialog.text: Go ahead. Focus on the impact on our sprint deliverables and overall timeline.

dialog.speaker: Marcus Webb
dialog.text: Clockchain hit 247 nodes overnight. The agent's been productive — three new causal clusters around the Industrial Revolution.

dialog.speaker: Sean McDonald
dialog.text: Good growth. What's the edge density looking like?

dialog.speaker: Aria Chen
dialog.text: Flash API usage is up 40% week-over-week. The meeting-sim skill is driving most of the new traffic.

scene.setting: A composite digital space within a Google Meet interface — individual video tiles framing each participant's workspace, creating a unified virtual meeting room.
scene.atmosphere: Professional and focused, with an undercurrent of early-morning urgency. The subtle pressure of reviewing sprint progress and growth metrics.
scene.lighting: Cool blue-white glow from screens, supplemented by soft natural morning light filtering through windows.

sensory_details.description: Occasional slight pixelation of video feeds — a common artifact of early morning network strain.
Soft rhythmic clicks of keyboards punctuated by crisp chat notification tones.
The faint imagined aroma of freshly brewed coffee — a shared ritual across the virtual space.
